exercises.name: Goblet Squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell vertically against your chest with both hands.
Step:2 Keeping your chest up and core engaged, lower your body down into a squat position by pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Step:3 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Back Squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Hold the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps or rear delts.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you begin to lower your body down.
Step:4 Bend at the knees and hips, pushing your hips back and down as if sitting into a chair.
Step:5 Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:6 Keep your knees in line with your toes and your weight in your heels.
Step:7 Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Step-Up
exercises.exerciseDbName: dumbbell step up single leg balance with bicep curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand in front of a step or platform with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Place your right foot on the step, ensuring your entire foot is in contact with the surface.
Step:3 Engage your core and push through your right heel to lift your body up onto the step, bringing your left knee up towards your chest.
Step:4 At the top of the movement, perform a bicep curl by bending your elbows and bringing the dumbbells towards your shoulders.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbells back down and simultaneously lower your left foot back to the ground.
Step:6 Repeat the movement on the opposite side, stepping up with your left foot and curling the dumbbells.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Reverse Lunge
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Take a step backward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Bend your left knee and lower your body until your left thigh is parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then push through your left heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side, stepping back with your left foot.

exercises.name: Regular Lunge
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and a barbell resting on your upper back.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, keeping your torso upright.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your right knee until your thigh is parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with your left leg, alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Hip Thrust
exercises.exerciseDbName: resistance band hip thrusts on knees (female)
instructions: Step:1 Start by kneeling on the ground with your knees hip-width apart and your feet flexed.
Step:2 Wrap the resistance band around your thighs, just above your knees.
Step:3 Place your hands on your hips or extend them out in front of you for balance.
Step:4 Engage your glutes and core muscles.
Step:5 Push your hips forward and squeeze your glutes as you lift your knees off the ground, extending your hips until your thighs are parallel to the ground.
Step:6 Hold the position for a moment, then slowly lower your knees back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to fit your body and select the desired weight.
Step:2 Lie face down on the machine with your legs straight and your heels against the padded lever.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or the sides of the machine for stability.
Step:4 Keeping your upper body stationary, exhale and curl your legs up as far as possible without lifting your hips off the pad.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your hamstrings.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the lever back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Leg Press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat and foot platform of the leverage machine to your desired position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the foot platform.
Step:3 Place your hands on the handles or sides of the machine for stability.
Step:4 Push one foot against the foot platform, extending your leg until it is almost fully straight.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly bend your leg and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat with the other leg.
Step:7 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and backrest of the machine to fit your body.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the footpad.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or sidebars for stability.
Step:4 Extend your legs forward by straightening your knees, lifting the weight.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the weight back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Glute Bridge
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying flat on your back on the ground with your knees bent and feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Place a barbell across your hips, holding it securely with both hands.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and core muscles, then lift your hips off the ground until your body forms a straight line from your knees to your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your glutes.
Step:5 Slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cable Kickback
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with your right hand and step back to create tension in the cable.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Keep your upper arm close to your body and your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:5 Extend your forearm backward, straightening your arm fully.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Push-Up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Step:2 Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:3 Pause for a moment when your chest is just above the ground, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Flat Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lift the barbell off the rack and hold it directly above your chest with your arms fully extended.
Step:4 Lower the barbell slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Step:6 Push the barbell back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Incline Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows at a 45-degree angle.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Decline Barbell Bench Press
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Flat Dumbbell Bench Press
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your palms facing forward and your arms extended above your chest.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells slowly to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Bench Press
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed firmly against the bench.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward, and lift them to shoulder height.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:5 Push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Decline Dumbbell Bench Press
instructions: Step:1 Lie down on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand and extend your arms straight up above your chest, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells slowly to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Standing Overhead Press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward.
Step:2 Press one dumbbell overhead, fully extending your arm.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbell back to shoulder level.
Step:4 Repeat with the other arm.
Step:5 Continue alternating arms for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Shoulder Press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lift the barbell off the rack and bring it to shoulder level, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Step:4 Press the barbell overhead by extending your arms fully.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to shoulder level.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Arnold Press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with back support and hold a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level, palms facing your body and elbows bent.
Step:2 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended and your palms are facing forward.
Step:3 Rotate your wrists as you lift, so that your palms are facing forward at the top of the movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Front Raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your thighs.
Step:2 Keeping your arms straight, exhale and lift the dumbbells in front of you until they are at shoulder level.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Tricep Pulldown
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and a slight bend in your knees.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Step:5 Exhale and push the bar down until your elbows are fully extended.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then inhale and slowly return the bar to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Tricep Press
exercises.exerciseDbName: cable rope high pulley overhead tricep extension
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to a high pulley and adjust the weight accordingly.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the pulley machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with both hands, palms facing down, and bring your hands above your head.
Step:4 Keep your upper arms close to your head and perpendicular to the floor.
Step:5 Slowly lower the rope behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Machine Reverse Fly
instructions: Step:1 Attach a D-handle to a low pulley cable machine and lie face down on a flat bench.
Step:2 Grasp the D-handle with each hand, palms facing down, and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, raise them out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Single-Arm Dumbbell Row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Let your arms hang straight down towards the floor, with your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 Pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Machine Row
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and footrests to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet on the footrests.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:5 Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement.
Step:7 Slowly release the handles and return to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the cable row machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, keeping your back straight and your shoulders relaxed.
Step:3 Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Chest-Supported Row
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Grab a dumbbell in each hand and sit on the bench with your chest against the incline.
Step:3 Extend your arms fully, allowing the dumbbells to hang straight down from your shoulders.
Step:4 Pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Pull-Up
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your arms fully extended.
Step:2 Engage your core and squeeze your shoulder blades together.
Step:3 Pull your body up towards the bar by bending your elbows and bringing your chest towards the bar.
Step:4 Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.exerciseDbName: cable lat pulldown full range of motion
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the lat pulldown machine with your knees positioned under the pads.
Step:2 Grasp the cable bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lean back slightly and keep your chest up, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back.
Step:4 Pull the bar down towards your upper chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Curl
exercises.exerciseDbName: dumbbell bicep curl with stork stance
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Extend one leg behind you, balancing on the toes of that foot.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.

exercises.name: Preacher Bar Curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against the support.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an underhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your arms extended towards the ceiling.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lift your legs off the ground, creating a 90-degree angle at your hips and knees.
Step:3 Engage your core and lower back to press your lower back into the ground.
Step:4 Slowly lower your right arm and left leg towards the ground, keeping them straight and hovering just above the floor.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the movement with your left arm and right leg.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Side Plank
exercises.exerciseDbName: dumbbell side plank with rear fly
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other.
Step:2 Place your forearm on the ground directly below your shoulder, keeping your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in your top hand, with your arm extended straight down towards the ground.
Step:4 Engage your core and lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:5 While maintaining the side plank position, lift the dumbbell up towards the ceiling, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

exercises.name: Medicine Ball Russian Twist
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your knees bent and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Hold a weight or medicine ball with both hands in front of your chest.
Step:3 Lean back slightly, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Slowly twist your torso to the right, bringing the weight or medicine ball towards the floor on your right side.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then twist your torso to the left, bringing the weight or medicine ball towards the floor on your left side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Sit-Up
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back on a mat with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, resting it on your chest.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Mountain Climbers
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Engage your core and bring your right knee towards your chest, then quickly switch and bring your left knee towards your chest.
Step:3 Continue alternating legs in a running motion, keeping your hips low and your core engaged.
Step:4 Maintain a steady pace and breathe evenly throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Beast Hold
instructions: Step:1 Start on all fours with your hands directly under your shoulders and your knees directly under your hips.
Step:2 Lift your knees slightly off the ground, keeping your back flat and your core engaged.
Step:3 Move your right hand and left foot forward simultaneously, followed by your left hand and right foot.
Step:4 Continue crawling forward, alternating your hand and foot movements.
Step:5 Maintain a steady pace and keep your core tight throughout the exercise.
Step:6 Continue for the desired distance or time.

exercises.name: Plank
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying face down on the floor.
Step:2 Place your forearms on the ground, with your elbows directly under your shoulders.
Step:3 Extend your legs straight out behind you, with your toes on the ground.
Step:4 Engage your core and lift your body off the ground, balancing on your forearms and toes.
Step:5 Keep your body in a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:6 Hold this position for the desired amount of time.
Step:7 Lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Bicycle Crunch
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your hands behind your head and your knees bent.
Step:2 Lift your feet off the ground and bring your right knee towards your chest while simultaneously twisting your torso to bring your left elbow towards your right knee.
Step:3 Straighten your right leg while bringing your left knee towards your chest and twisting your torso to bring your right elbow towards your left knee.
Step:4 Continue alternating the twisting motion, as if you are pedaling a bicycle, while keeping your core engaged throughout the movement.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Reverse Crunch
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your arms extended along your sides.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lift your feet off the ground, bringing your thighs perpendicular to the floor.
Step:3 Contract your abs and curl your hips off the floor, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Standing Hamstring Stretch
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Step forward with your right foot and shift your weight onto your right leg.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight, slowly bend forward at the hips, reaching towards your right foot with both hands.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Seated Hamstring Stretch
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Slowly roll the ball forward, walking your feet out until your upper back is resting on the ball and your legs are extended straight in front of you.
Step:3 Place your hands on your hips for support.
Step:4 Engage your core and slowly lower your upper body towards the ground, keeping your back straight and your chest lifted.
Step:5 Stop when you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, and hold the position for 20-30 seconds.
Step:6 Slowly return to the starting position by pushing through your heels and using your hamstrings to pull yourself back up.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Hip Flexor Stretch
instructions: Step:1 Place the stability ball on the ground and kneel in front of it.
Step:2 Place your right foot on top of the stability ball, with your knee bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Extend your left leg behind you, keeping it straight.
Step:4 Lean forward, pushing your hips towards the stability ball, until you feel a stretch in your right hip flexor.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then switch sides and repeat.

exercises.name: Quad Stretch
exercises.exerciseDbName: intermediate hip flexor and quad stretch
instructions: Step:1 Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold onto a stable object for support.
Step:3 Bend your right knee and bring your right foot towards your glutes, grabbing the rope with your right hand.
Step:4 Slowly pull your right foot towards your glutes, feeling a stretch in your right quad.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:6 Release the stretch and repeat on the left side.

exercises.name: Calf Stretch
exercises.exerciseDbName: standing hamstring and calf stretch with strap
instructions: Step:1 Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the strap with both hands and place it around the ball of your foot.
Step:3 Keep your leg straight and slowly lean forward from your hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Feel the stretch in your hamstring and calf muscles.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:6 Release the stretch and repeat with the other leg.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Doorway Chest Stretch
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold the exercise ball with both hands and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Step:3 Slowly bring the exercise ball towards your chest, feeling a stretch in your chest muscles.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for a few seconds, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Cross-Body Shoulder Stretch
exercises.exerciseDbName: chest and front of shoulder stretch
instructions: Step:1 Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight out in front of you at shoulder height.
Step:3 Cross your arms in front of your body, with your right arm on top of your left arm.
Step:4 Interlace your fingers and press your palms together.
Step:5 Gently squeeze your shoulder blades together and push your hands forward, feeling a stretch in your chest and front of your shoulders.
Step:6 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds, then release.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: Triceps Stretch
instructions: Step:1 Stand or sit upright with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend one arm overhead, bending at the elbow so that your hand reaches towards the opposite shoulder blade.
Step:3 With your other hand, gently pull the elbow of the extended arm towards the opposite side of your head, feeling a stretch in your triceps.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, then release.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Neck Side Stretch
instructions: Step:1 Stand or sit up straight with your shoulders relaxed.
Step:2 Tilt your head to the right, bringing your right ear towards your right shoulder.
Step:3 Place your right hand on the left side of your head and gently apply pressure to increase the stretch.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side, tilting your head to the left and applying pressure with your left hand.
Step:6 Repeat the stretch 2-3 times on each side.

exercises.name: Seated Spinal Twist
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a stability ball with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Hold a weight plate or dumbbell with both hands close to your chest.
Step:3 Engage your core and slowly rotate your torso to one side, keeping your hips stable.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the rotation, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the rotation to the other side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

exercises.name: World's Greatest Stretch
instructions: Step:1 Start in a lunge position with your right foot forward and your left foot back.
Step:2 Place your hands on the ground on either side of your right foot.
Step:3 Lower your left knee to the ground and extend your right leg, keeping your right foot flat on the ground.
Step:4 Rotate your torso to the right, reaching your right arm up towards the ceiling.
Step:5 Hold this position for a few seconds, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Switch sides and repeat the stretch with your left foot forward.
